Classes at Lifeyoga

Find the practice
that finds you.

Thirty-plus classes across three intensities, led by teachers who know that yoga looks different for every body. Novice or veteran — we'll help you land on the one that fits today.

Group classes

Practice in community — we believe group energy empowers, heals, and grows something a solo practice can't reach.

Private classes

Therapy-based, in smaller studios. To address imbalances, or to take a particular asana deeper.

Why start with a membership

Commit once. Practice as much as your life allows.

Members get every class on this page — from 6 AM Hatha to a late-evening Yin reset — plus priority booking and members-only classes like Aerial Yoga.

See plans → Try a free class
28+Class styles across 3 intensities
7Days a week, 6 AM to 10 PM
60–90Minute classes to fit your schedule
15+Certified teachers, unique lenses
Before you book

A few things worth knowing.

Still have questions? Our team is on WhatsApp and happy to walk you through anything — from which class fits a new injury to whether your pregnancy is at a good stage for Prenatal.

Chat on WhatsApp →
Not at all. Our Simple-intensity classes — Hatha Basic, Vinyasa Basic, Warm Stretch, Yog Nidra — are designed for first-timers. Your teacher will modify postures to your level. Start there and move up as your body's ready.
Comfortable clothes you can move in, a water bottle, and yourself. Mats, blocks, straps, wall-ropes, and silks are all provided. For hot classes, a small towel helps.
Start by filtering above — by goal (what you want) or intensity (how hard you want to work). If you're unsure, try Yoga Relay: 90 minutes spanning multiple styles and teachers. It's the fastest way to figure out what clicks for your body.
Yes — several. Prenatal is designed for every trimester. Yoga Reset is built around recovery and mobility. Iyengar-style uses props to meet you where your body is. Message us and we'll recommend the right fit.
Yes, up to 4 hours before class start. You can manage all bookings through the Lifeyoga app on iOS and Google Play.
Start where you are

Your first class is on us.

Show up once, try one class, see if the studio feels like yours. No commitment, no pressure — just a mat, a teacher, and 60 minutes of you.
